description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms raised and extended outward in a dramatic V-shape. The person has a slender build and is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with visible shoes. The head is proportionate to the body, and the facial features are simplified but recognizable. The arms are the most striking feature, appearing much longer than natural human proportions and extending well above the head. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian, but the arm pose gives the figure a unique and somewhat surreal character.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, raised arms, wearing a sleeveless top and pants, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both arms dramatically raised and extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's length and upward extension, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and the arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the arm's exaggerated length, and the upright stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended outward
